programme.title: Engineering The Future
programme.desc: The sixth largest greenhouse gas emitter, is transforming its industry by developing innovative machines

programme.title: Engineering The Future
programme.desc: Innovators are exploring ways to harness the sun's vast energy potential, ensuring its continuous availability

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: CCGS Henry Larsen battles ice, storms, and rescues to aid isolated communities in Newfoundland.

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: Tregurtha's first mission of the season pushes ship and crew to the brink of exhaustion.

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: Emma Maersk completes mission despite pirates, cyclones, and Suez Canal traffic congestion.

programme.title: Mega Transports
programme.desc: The Antonov An 124-100M transports a valuable generator 11,000 km from England to South Korea.

programme.title: Mega Transports
programme.desc: Malmberget, Sweden, was relocated by Mammoet to Koskullskulle for safety from mine works.

programme.title: Mega Transports
programme.desc: Mega Transports, engineering marvels, carry 19,000 containers, requiring months of planning.

programme.title: Air Crash Confidential
programme.desc: A father murdered an air traffic controller after 47 children died in a plane cras

programme.title: Crash of the Century
programme.desc: One of the worst air disasters in the 1970’s when two passenger airlines collided in the Canary Islands.

programme.title: Exceptional Engineering
programme.desc: A modern electric locomotive is being built in Munich, Germany, at a 45,000 sqm facility.

programme.title: Exceptional Engineering
programme.desc: A motor home, costing over euro100,000, is built from chassis to luxurious vacation home.

programme.title: Exceptional Engineering
programme.desc: The Volvo S60, the world's largest articulated hauler, can transport up to 55 metric tons.

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: Vessel to build huge natural gas compression station 300m below sea level.

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: World's largest RoRo ship speeds up to haul luxury cars, SUVs, and gear across the Atlantic.

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: Converted hospital ship braves Panama Canal to aid Caribbean poor despite many challenges.

programme.title: Space Smash
programme.desc: Space Smash explores satellite orbit congestion and efforts to manage debris through global programs.

programme.title: Space: Into The Great Beyond
programme.desc: Humanity is nearing a new era with advanced robots on Mars, preparing for our arrival and future.

programme.title: Rocket Science
programme.sub-title: The Success Story of Ariane 5 - Part 1
programme.desc: With raw power and flawless precision, Ariane 5 carries Europe’s dreams into orbit.

programme.title: Rocket Science
programme.sub-title: The Success Story of Ariane 5 - Part 2
programme.desc: Reliability meets raw power Ariane 5 launches Europe’s biggest payloads into the stars.

programme.title: Solar Storms - The Enigmatic Danger
programme.desc: Scientists study solar storms with Parker Solar Probe to predict disruptions and protect infrastructure.

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: Alaska's biggest longliners battle high seas, fierce winds to haul in major cod catch.

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: Advanced drill ship constructs oil well over 2,000m deep in Gulf of Mexico waters.

programme.desc: A modern electric locomotive is being built in Munich, Germany, at a 45,000 sqm facility.

programme.desc: A motor home, costing over euro100,000, is built from chassis to luxurious vacation home.
